MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion for Summary Judgment Pursuant To CCP 437c.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed summary judgment motion is granted.

Order signed.
